name: Beet Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lemon juice and Sure-Jell in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, stirring until the Sure-Jell dissolves completely.
3. Add 4 cups of sugar and bring back to a boil for one minute.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the Jello until it dissolves.
5. Pour into jars and let cool before storing.
